name: Joutun
short_description: Joutun - A 2D pixel top-down game where the player takes on the role of a hero with various skills, from shooting to slowing down time. Fending off waves of enemies and increasing their level, the player must reach their maximum potential, beating their record.
detailed_description:
A martial arts master, after his death, finds himself in an afterlife teeming with demons and skeletons. However, the master is not so simple, and thanks to his skills honed over the years and the magic of the afterlife, he will try to prove his mastery in the world of the dead.

Joutun - A 2D pixel top-down game where the player takes on the role of a hero with various skills, from shooting to slowing down time. Fending off waves of enemies and increasing their level, the player must reach their maximum potential, beating their record.

Controls:

Left Mouse Button - Shoot
Right Mouse Button - Triple Shot
WASD - Move
CTRL - Roll
F - Shoot in all directions
ALT - Slow Time

Game Features:

Visual Style
Skills and Abilities
Increasing Difficulty
